# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $name = trim((string) $request->input('name', ''));
        $category = $request->input('category', null);
        $minPrice = $request->input('min_price', null);
        $maxPrice = $request->input('max_price', null);

        $sort = (string) $request->input('sort', 'relevance');
        $dir = strtolower((string) $request->input('dir', 'desc')) === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';

        $perPage = (int) $request->input('per_page', 24);
        if ($perPage < 1) $perPage = 24;
        if ($perPage > 100) $perPage = 100;

        $page = (int) $request->input('page', 1);
        if ($page < 1) $page = 1;

        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        $bindings = [];
        $wheres = [];
        $joins = [];

        $wheres[] = 'p.is_active = 1';

        $hasCategoryJoin = false;
        if ($category !== null && $category !== '') {
            $hasCategoryJoin = true;
            $joins[] = 'INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id';
            if (is_numeric($category)) {
                $wheres[] = 'p.category_id = ?';
                $bindings[] = (int) $category;
            } else {
                $wheres[] = '(c.slug = ? OR c.name = ?)';
                $bindings[] = (string) $category;
                $bindings[] = (string) $category;
            }
        }

        $minPriceNum = null;
        $maxPriceNum = null;

        if ($minPrice !== null && $minPrice !== '') {
            $minPriceNum = (float) $minPrice;
            $wheres[] = 'p.price >= ?';
            $bindings[] = $minPriceNum;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null && $maxPrice !== '') {
            $maxPriceNum = (float) $maxPrice;
            $wheres[] = 'p.price <= ?';
            $bindings[] = $maxPriceNum;
        }

        $selects = [
            'p.id',
            'p.sku',
            'p.name',
            'p.slug',
            'p.category_id',
            'p.price',
            'p.currency',
            'p.thumbnail_url',
            'p.rating',
            'p.review_count',
            'p.created_at',
            'p.updated_at',
        ];

        $orderBy = 'p.created_at DESC';
        $extraSelect = '';

        if ($sort === 'price') {
            $orderBy = 'p.price ' . $dir . ', p.id DESC';
        } elseif ($sort === 'newest') {
            $orderBy = 'p.created_at ' . $dir . ', p.id DESC';
        } elseif ($sort === 'rating') {
            $orderBy = 'p.rating ' . $dir . ', p.review_count DESC, p.id DESC';
        } elseif ($sort === 'name') {
            $orderBy = 'p.name ' . $dir . ', p.id DESC';
        } else {
            if ($name !== '') {
                $q = mb_strtolower($name);
                $q = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $q);
                $q = trim($q);

                $qLike = '%' . str_replace(['\\', '%', '_'], ['\\\\', '\\%', '\\_'], $q) . '%';

                $wheres[] = '(LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? OR LOWER(p.sku) LIKE ? OR LOWER(p.slug) LIKE ?)';
                $bindings[] = $qLike;
                $bindings[] = $qLike;
                $bindings[] = $qLike;

                $extraSelect = ', (
                    (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) = ? THEN 100 ELSE 0 END) +
                    (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE ? THEN 30 ELSE 0 END) +
                    (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.sku) = ? THEN 60 ELSE 0 END) +
                    (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.sku) LIKE ? THEN 20 ELSE 0 END) +
                    (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.slug) = ? THEN 40 ELSE 0 END) +
                    (CASE WHEN LOWER(p.slug) LIKE ? THEN 15 ELSE 0 END)
                ) AS relevance_score';

                $bindings[] = $q;
                $bindings[] = $qLike;
                $bindings[] = $q;
                $bindings[] = $qLike;
                $bindings[] = $q;
                $bindings[] = $qLike;

                $orderBy = 'relevance_score DESC, p.id DESC';
            } else {
                $orderBy = 'p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC';
            }
        }

        if (!$hasCategoryJoin) {
            $joins[] = 'LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id';
        }

        $from = 'products p';
        $joinSql = $joins ? (' ' . implode(' ', array_unique($joins))) : '';
        $whereSql = $wheres ? (' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $wheres)) : '';

        $selectSql = 'SELECT ' . implode(', ', $selects) . ', c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug' . $extraSelect .
            ' FROM ' . $from . $joinSql . $whereSql .
            ' ORDER BY ' . $orderBy .
            ' LIMIT ' . (int) $perPage . ' OFFSET ' . (int) $offset;

        $countSql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) AS aggregate FROM ' . $from . $joinSql . $whereSql;

        $rows = DB::select(DB::raw($selectSql), $bindings);
        $countRow = DB::selectOne(DB::raw($countSql), $bindings);

        $total = (int) ($countRow->aggregate ?? 0);

        return response()->json([
            'data' => $rows,
            'meta' => [
                'page' => $page,
                'per_page' => $perPage,
                'total' => $total,
                'total_pages' => $perPage > 0 ? (int) ceil($total / $perPage) : 0,
                'filters' => [
                    'name' => $name !== '' ? $name : null,
                    'category' => ($category !== null && $category !== '') ? $category : null,
                    'min_price' => $minPriceNum,
                    'max_price' => $maxPriceNum,
                    'sort' => $sort,
                    'dir' => $dir,
                ],
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
